analysis_scope_roles.autosome_all_snps: sensitivity: linked multi-SNP-per-RAD source scope with a capped reservoir and intra-tag pseudoreplication
analysis_scope_roles.autosome_one_per_RAD_locus: primary: first source-ordered SNP per Stacks catalog RAD locus; removes within-tag pseudoreplication but not chromosome-scale linkage

direction_head.model: StandardScaler plus multinomial logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
direction_head.representation: mean and population SD over g=2..16 for each of 27 non-depth coordinates; identical to the external-panel depth grid
direction_head.score_interpretation: uncalibrated out-of-distribution score; not a probability or posterior
direction_head.training_selection: all positive canonical replicates at every migration rate

direction_panel_locus_contract: holdout and direct panels share exact ordered loci within each scope/filter. Marginal chromosome-block summaries use the same seed, but no paired-difference statistic or paired inferential claim is reported

gate_head.model: StandardScaler plus binary logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
gate_head.representation: selected depth rows plus across-depth mean of 27 non-depth coordinates
gate_head.score_interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not the canonical 243-D gate probability
gate_head.training_target: positive migration with rate >=2.5e-4 versus weak positives plus control

guardrail: Sample-disjoint and circular direction stress tests plus qualitative gate near-null contrasts; no panel is gold unidirectional truth or accuracy-eligible.

standard_contract.interpretation: families use separately ascertained locus draws; overlaps document the mismatch, so cross-family gate-score contrasts remain qualitative

within_population_polymorphism.interpretation: families use separately ascertained locus draws; overlaps document the mismatch, so cross-family gate-score contrasts remain qualitative

standard_contract.interpretation: families use separately ascertained locus draws; overlaps document the mismatch, so cross-family gate-score contrasts remain qualitative

within_population_polymorphism.interpretation: families use separately ascertained locus draws; overlaps document the mismatch, so cross-family gate-score contrasts remain qualitative

standard_contract.interpretation: independently capped/reservoir-sampled scopes are not a paired locus analysis; the overlap is reported to expose that ascertainment difference

within_population_polymorphism.interpretation: independently capped/reservoir-sampled scopes are not a paired locus analysis; the overlap is reported to expose that ascertainment difference

standard_contract.interpretation: independently capped/reservoir-sampled scopes are not a paired locus analysis; the overlap is reported to expose that ascertainment difference

within_population_polymorphism.interpretation: independently capped/reservoir-sampled scopes are not a paired locus analysis; the overlap is reported to expose that ascertainment difference

standard_contract.interpretation: independently capped/reservoir-sampled scopes are not a paired locus analysis; the overlap is reported to expose that ascertainment difference

within_population_polymorphism.interpretation: independently capped/reservoir-sampled scopes are not a paired locus analysis; the overlap is reported to expose that ascertainment difference

direction.interpretation: the filters are separate ascertainment analyses; any independently capped sets also differ through reservoir sampling

geographic.interpretation: the filters are separate ascertainment analyses; any independently capped sets also differ through reservoir sampling

recent.interpretation: the filters are separate ascertainment analyses; any independently capped sets also differ through reservoir sampling

direction.interpretation: the filters are separate ascertainment analyses; any independently capped sets also differ through reservoir sampling

geographic.interpretation: the filters are separate ascertainment analyses; any independently capped sets also differ through reservoir sampling

recent.interpretation: the filters are separate ascertainment analyses; any independently capped sets also differ through reservoir sampling

manifest_selection_provenance.construction_audit: frozen manifests were independently checked against the pinned author workbook fields during bundle construction; the runner deliberately does not dynamically parse Excel metadata
manifest_selection_provenance.holdout_limit: individual-disjoint from the 95 direction females, but not study-independent: global source filters used all 452 birds and the candidate label comes from the same biological study system
manifest_selection_provenance.runtime_checks: exact counts, subgroup/set relations, manifest hashes, and presence of every sample in the pinned 452-bird VCF

outcome_summary.interpretation: severe-OOD direction-transfer and gate-specificity stress-test outcome; thresholded natural-data scores are abstained, not validated calls or accuracy observations

external_expectation.locus_filter_variant: both alleles called across every complete three-population panel
external_expectation.scope_role: primary: first source-ordered SNP per Stacks catalog RAD locus; removes within-tag pseudoreplication but not chromosome-scale linkage
external_expectation.selection: P2 selected by sex=M, location=Mpofu, author species=chrysoconus; disjoint from all 95 direction females
external_expectation.truth_strength: weak system-level asymmetric/majority label; current evidence is bidirectional

filter_contract.cap_method: fixed-seed reservoir over eligible loci, restored to source order
filter_contract.filter: PASS or dot (sources are author-filtered releases)
filter_contract.polymorphism: both REF and ALT must be called across every declared three-population panel
filter_contract.variant: single-base REF and single-base ALT; no multiallelic ALT

chromosome_block_bootstrap.guardrail: fixed-panel descriptive chromosome-block uncertainty; sample ascertainment and chromosome-scale linkage remain, and these are not accuracy confidence intervals
chromosome_block_bootstrap.method: nonparametric chromosome-block bootstrap over SUPER_1 through SUPER_44

model_free_comparator.interpretation: sample-frequency geometry; projection is reference-flip invariant but has endpoint sampling error and is not bounded ancestry or temporal direction. Plug-in f3-like geometry and a finite-called-copy P2 correction are both reported. The correction is exact only under independent binomial chromosome sampling and is not labelled generally unbiased. The diagnostic-locus projection is endpoint-ascertained on these same sample frequencies and remains descriptive.

simulation_feature_shift.reference: StandardScaler fitted to 2,700 positive regen_full summaries on the identical g=2..16 grid

simulation_gate.interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not a probability or posterior

simulation_head.interpretation: uncalibrated OOD scores; not probabilities or posteriors

external_expectation.locus_filter_variant: both alleles called across every complete three-population panel
external_expectation.scope_role: primary: first source-ordered SNP per Stacks catalog RAD locus; removes within-tag pseudoreplication but not chromosome-scale linkage
external_expectation.selection: P2 selected by inferred maternal ancestry from these same genotypes
external_expectation.truth_strength: aggregate asymmetry: paternal ancestry spans the full range; not 14 exact positives

filter_contract.filter: PASS or dot (sources are author-filtered releases)
filter_contract.polymorphism: both REF and ALT must be called within every population of every declared panel
filter_contract.variant: single-base REF and single-base ALT; no multiallelic ALT

chromosome_block_bootstrap.guardrail: fixed-panel descriptive chromosome-block uncertainty; sample ascertainment and chromosome-scale linkage remain, and these are not accuracy confidence intervals
chromosome_block_bootstrap.method: nonparametric chromosome-block bootstrap over SUPER_1 through SUPER_44

model_free_comparator.interpretation: sample-frequency geometry; projection is reference-flip invariant but has endpoint sampling error and is not bounded ancestry or temporal direction. Plug-in f3-like geometry and a finite-called-copy P2 correction are both reported. The correction is exact only under independent binomial chromosome sampling and is not labelled generally unbiased. The diagnostic-locus projection is endpoint-ascertained on these same sample frequencies and remains descriptive.

simulation_feature_shift.reference: StandardScaler fitted to 2,700 positive regen_full summaries on the identical g=2..16 grid

simulation_gate.interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not a probability or posterior

simulation_head.interpretation: uncalibrated OOD scores; not probabilities or posteriors

published_direction_evidence.candidate_class_C_meaning: predominant/asymmetric pusillus ancestry into extoni-background contact birds; not exclusive direction
published_direction_evidence.current_guardrail: Rancilhac et al. 2025 infer bidirectional introgression tails and core-range effects
published_direction_evidence.direction_inference: paternal ancestry equals daughter Z ancestry; maternal ancestry is clipped 2*autosomal minus Z ancestry
published_direction_evidence.numerical_discrepancy: main text z=6.949 differs from Supplementary Table S14 z=6.714

runtime.process_priority: BelowNormal requested at runner start on Windows

source.ascertainment_guardrails: ddRAD restriction-site sampling; global MAF>=5% and <=20% missingness over 452 birds; mapping to a P. pusillus reference; these affect richness/private channels

autosome_extraction.selection: SUPER_1 through SUPER_44; Z, W, S76/non-numbered, and unplaced sequence excluded

source.called_copy_guardrail: PADZE g=16 makes all eight PusillusRefExact8 birds completely called at every retained locus, while larger P1/P2 groups may retain missing calls; this is asymmetric missingness ascertainment

one_per_RAD_locus_extraction.selection: first source-ordered SNP per Stacks catalog RAD-locus ID prefix

source_vcf_contract.source_order_guardrail: Stacks rows are not genomic-position sorted; one-per-RAD selection is source-first and occurs before any sorting
source_vcf_contract.source_paper_count_reconciliation: paper 82,950 ddRAD SNPs equals 82,309 numbered autosomal plus 641 S76/non-numbered or unplaced non-sex rows; source total 84,112 additionally includes 1,157 Z and 5 W
